---
subtitle: Designing Groundwork for Trustworth Data
keywords: 
  - sustainable consumption and production
  - life cycle analysis
  - Safe and Sustainable by Design
---
# Digital Product Passports (DPP) {#sec-digital-product-passports}

::: {.chapterabstract}
Draft abstract: this chapter opens Part III by demonstrating how a machine-readable Digital Product Passport schema populated by the de-risking matrix of Chapter 6 can help an industry sector in green digital transformation of products and services.
:::

::: {.keywords}
Digital Product Passport &middot; lifecycle traceability &middot; SSbD compliance &middot; supply-chain verification
:::

## 7.1 DPP Data Architecture
- Machine-readable attribute schema for supply-chain lifecycle tracking.

## 7.2 Lifecycle Traceability and SSbD Compliance Linkage
- Mapping @sec-ssbd-derisking-matrix outputs directly into DPP fields.

## 7.3 Case Application: A Semiconductor Supply-Chain DPP
- Worked example, carried through to the RegTech alignment in
  @sec-regtech-defa-alignment.

::: {.callout-tip title="Bridge to Chapter 8"}
Chapter 8 addresses who is allowed to see and act on this passport data.
:::
